service.description: List campaigns for owner with optional status filter

parameter.name: campaigns
parameter.description: List of campaign maps matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

iterate.script: campaigns.add([ marketingCampaignId: camp.marketingCampaignId, pseudoId: camp.pseudoId, ownerPartyId: camp.ownerPartyId, campaignName: camp.campaignName, campaignSummary: camp.campaignSummary, platforms: camp.platforms, targetAudience: camp.targetAudience, landingPageId: camp.landingPageId, messageTemplate: camp.messageTemplate, emailSubject: camp.emailSubject, platformSettings: camp.platformSettings, statusId: camp.statusId ?: 'MKTG_CAMP_PLANNED', dailyLimitPerPlatform: camp.dailyLimitPerPlatform ?: 50, budgetedCost: camp.budgetedCost?.toString(), actualCost: camp.actualCost?.toString(), estimatedCost: camp.estimatedCost?.toString(), expectedRevenue: camp.expectedRevenue?.toString(), numSent: totalMessages, convertedLeads: camp.convertedLeads?.toString(), expectedResponsePercent: camp.expectedResponsePercent?.toString(), isActive: camp.isActive, fromDate: camp.fromDate ? ec.l10n.format(camp.fromDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, thruDate: camp.thruDate ? ec.l10n.format(camp.thruDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, startDate: camp.startDate ? ec.l10n.format(camp.startDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, messagesSent: camp.messagesSent ?: 0, responsesReceived: camp.responsesReceived ?: 0, leadsGenerated: camp.leadsGenerated ?: 0 ])

service.description: Get campaign with messages and metrics

parameter.name: campaign
parameter.description: Campaign map matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

set.from: [ marketingCampaignId: campaignValue.marketingCampaignId, pseudoId: campaignValue.pseudoId, campaignName: campaignValue.campaignName, campaignSummary: campaignValue.campaignSummary, platforms: campaignValue.platforms, targetAudience: campaignValue.targetAudience, landingPageId: campaignValue.landingPageId, messageTemplate: campaignValue.messageTemplate, emailSubject: campaignValue.emailSubject, platformSettings: campaignValue.platformSettings, statusId: campaignValue.statusId ?: 'MKTG_CAMP_PLANNED', dailyLimitPerPlatform: campaignValue.dailyLimitPerPlatform ?: 50, budgetedCost: campaignValue.budgetedCost?.toString(), actualCost: campaignValue.actualCost?.toString(), estimatedCost: campaignValue.estimatedCost?.toString(), expectedRevenue: campaignValue.expectedRevenue?.toString(), numSent: campaignValue.numSent ?: 0, convertedLeads: campaignValue.convertedLeads?.toString(), expectedResponsePercent: campaignValue.expectedResponsePercent?.toString(), isActive: campaignValue.isActive, fromDate: campaignValue.fromDate ? ec.l10n.format(campaignValue.fromDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, thruDate: campaignValue.thruDate ? ec.l10n.format(campaignValue.thruDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, startDate: campaignValue.startDate ? ec.l10n.format(campaignValue.startDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null ]

iterate.script: messages.add([ messageId: msg.messageId, marketingCampaignId: msg.marketingCampaignId, platform: msg.platform, recipientName: msg.recipientName, recipientProfileUrl: msg.recipientProfileUrl, recipientHandle: msg.recipientHandle, recipientEmail: msg.recipientEmail, recipientCompany: msg.recipientCompany, recipientTitle: msg.recipientTitle, messageContent: msg.messageContent, sentDate: msg.sentDate?.toString(), responseDate: msg.responseDate?.toString(), status: msg.status, errorMessage: msg.errorMessage, convertedPartyId: msg.convertedPartyId ])

set.from: [ metricId: metricsEntity?.metricId, marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, messagesSent: metricsEntity?.messagesSent ?: 0, messagesPending: messagesPending, messagesFailed: messagesFailed, responsesReceived: metricsEntity?.responsesReceived ?: 0, leadsGenerated: metricsEntity?.leadsGenerated ?: 0, lastUpdated: metricsEntity?.lastUpdated?.toString() ]

service.description: Create a new marketing campaign for outreach

parameter.name: campaign
parameter.description: Campaign map matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

parameter.name: campaign
parameter.description: Created campaign map matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, seqName: 'marketingCampaign']

service-call.name: create#mantle.marketing.campaign.MarketingCampaign
service-call.in-map: [ pseudoId: pseudoId, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, campaignName: campaignName, campaignSummary: campaignSummary, platforms: platforms, targetAudience: targetAudience, landingPageId: landingPageId, messageTemplate: messageTemplate, emailSubject: emailSubject, platformSettings: platformSettings, statusId: 'MKTG_CAMP_PLANNED', dailyLimitPerPlatform: dailyLimitPerPlatform, budgetedCost: budgetedCost, estimatedCost: estimatedCost, expectedRevenue: expectedRevenue, expectedResponsePercent: expectedResponsePercent, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, isActive: 'N', createdByUserLogin: ec.user.userId, lastModifiedByUserLogin: ec.user.userId]

service-call.name: create#growerp.marketing.CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: createOut.marketingCampaignId, messagesSent: 0, responsesReceived: 0, leadsGenerated: 0, lastUpdated: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

set.from: [ marketingCampaignId: createOut.marketingCampaignId, pseudoId: pseudoId, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, campaignName: campaignName, campaignSummary: campaignSummary, platforms: platforms, targetAudience: targetAudience, landingPageId: landingPageId, messageTemplate: messageTemplate, emailSubject: emailSubject, platformSettings: platformSettings, statusId: 'MKTG_CAMP_PLANNED', dailyLimitPerPlatform: dailyLimitPerPlatform, budgetedCost: budgetedCost?.toString(), estimatedCost: estimatedCost?.toString(), expectedRevenue: expectedRevenue?.toString(), expectedResponsePercent: expectedResponsePercent?.toString(), fromDate: ec.l10n.format(ec.user.nowTimestamp, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ'), startDate: null ]

service.description: Update an existing marketing campaign

parameter.name: campaign
parameter.description: Campaign map matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

parameter.name: campaign
parameter.description: Updated campaign map matching frontend OutreachCampaign model

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, seqName: 'marketingCampaign']

service-call.name: update#mantle.marketing.campaign.MarketingCampaign
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, campaignName: campaignName, campaignSummary: campaignSummary, pseudoId: pseudoId, platforms: platforms, targetAudience: targetAudience, landingPageId: landingPageId, messageTemplate: messageTemplate, emailSubject: emailSubject, platformSettings: platformSettings, statusId: statusId, dailyLimitPerPlatform: dailyLimitPerPlatform, budgetedCost: budgetedCost, actualCost: actualCost, estimatedCost: estimatedCost, expectedRevenue: expectedRevenue, expectedResponsePercent: expectedResponsePercent, isActive: isActive, lastModifiedByUserLogin: ec.user.userId]

set.from: [ marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, pseudoId: pseudoId ?: existingCampaign.pseudoId, campaignName: campaignName ?: existingCampaign.campaignName, campaignSummary: campaignSummary ?: existingCampaign.campaignSummary, platforms: platforms ?: existingCampaign.platforms, targetAudience: targetAudience ?: existingCampaign.targetAudience, landingPageId: landingPageId ?: existingCampaign.landingPageId, messageTemplate: messageTemplate ?: existingCampaign.messageTemplate, emailSubject: emailSubject ?: existingCampaign.emailSubject, platformSettings: platformSettings ?: existingCampaign.platformSettings, statusId: statusId ?: existingCampaign.statusId ?: 'MKTG_CAMP_PLANNED', dailyLimitPerPlatform: dailyLimitPerPlatform ?: existingCampaign.dailyLimitPerPlatform ?: 50, budgetedCost: (budgetedCost ?: existingCampaign.budgetedCost)?.toString(), actualCost: (actualCost ?: existingCampaign.actualCost)?.toString(), estimatedCost: (estimatedCost ?: existingCampaign.estimatedCost)?.toString(), expectedRevenue: (expectedRevenue ?: existingCampaign.expectedRevenue)?.toString(), expectedResponsePercent: (expectedResponsePercent ?: existingCampaign.expectedResponsePercent)?.toString(), isActive: isActive ?: existingCampaign.isActive, fromDate: existingCampaign.fromDate ? ec.l10n.format(existingCampaign.fromDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, thruDate: existingCampaign.thruDate ? ec.l10n.format(existingCampaign.thruDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, startDate: existingCampaign.startDate ? ec.l10n.format(existingCampaign.startDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null ]

service.description: Delete a campaign and its associated data
Create a Sales Opportunity from a responded OutreachMessage. Delegates to the standard CRM create#Opportunity service.

log.message: Message ${messageId} has no campaign linked. Cannot create opportunity.
Campaign ${marketingCampaignId} has no ownerPartyId. Cannot create opportunity.
Cannot resolve a userPartyId for campaign ${marketingCampaignId}. Cannot create opportunity.

service-call.name: growerp.100.PartyServices100.create#User
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: campaign.ownerPartyId, user: [firstName: firstName, lastName: lastName, role: 'Prospect', email: message.recipientEmail]]

log.message: SalesOpportunity already exists for campaign ${marketingCampaignId} and party ${partyId}. Skipping creation.

service-call.name: growerp.100.CrmServices100.create#Opportunity
service-call.in-map: [userPartyId: userPartyId, opportunity: [ opportunityName: oppName, stageId: 'Qualification', description: 'Generated from OutreachMessage ' + messageId, employeeUser: [partyId: partyId] ]]

log.message: Created SalesOpportunity ${salesOpportunityId} for message ${messageId} via CRM service

service.description: Record a sent outreach message

service-call.name: create#growerp.marketing.OutreachMessage
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, platform: platform, recipientName: recipientName, recipientProfileUrl: recipientProfileUrl, recipientHandle: recipientHandle, recipientEmail: recipientEmail, recipientCompany: recipientCompany, recipientTitle: recipientTitle, messageContent: messageContent, sentDate: status == 'SENT' ? ec.user.nowTimestamp : null, status: status, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: growerp.100.OutreachServices100.update#CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, incrementMessagesSent: status == 'SENT']

service.description: Update message status (e.g., mark as responded)

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.OutreachMessage
service-call.in-map: [messageId: messageId, status: status, sentDate: sentDate ?: (status == 'SENT' ? ec.user.nowTimestamp : null), responseDate: responseDate ?: (status == 'RESPONDED' ? ec.user.nowTimestamp : null), errorMessage: errorMessage]

service-call.name: growerp.100.OutreachServices100.update#CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: message.marketingCampaignId, incrementResponses: true]

service-call.name: growerp.100.OutreachServices100.update#CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: message.marketingCampaignId, incrementMessagesSent: true]

service.description: Set the (AI-personalised) body of a PENDING outreach message. Used by the Outreach Personalizer agent after generate#PlatformMessage. Refuses messages already sent.

return.message: Can only edit PENDING messages; ${messageId} is ${message.status}

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.OutreachMessage
service-call.in-map: [messageId: messageId, messageContent: messageContent]

service.description: Delete an outreach message

Bulk-load recipients (e.g. a 4000-row LinkedIn/email CSV) as PENDING OutreachMessages for a campaign. Each recipient becomes one OutreachMessage; messageContent is auto-personalised from the campaign's (or per-platform) messageTemplate by substituting {name}/{company}/{title} with the recipient's fields, unless the row already supplies an explicit messageContent. An optional AI polish pass can refine tone afterwards (polish#OutreachMessage).

parameter.name: defaultPlatform
parameter.description: Platform to use when a recipient row omits one

service-call.name: create#growerp.marketing.OutreachMessage
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, platform: rcptPlatform, recipientName: recipient.recipientName, recipientProfileUrl: recipient.recipientProfileUrl, recipientHandle: recipient.recipientHandle, recipientEmail: recipient.recipientEmail, recipientCompany: recipient.recipientCompany, recipientTitle: recipient.recipientTitle, messageContent: computedMessageContent, status: 'PENDING', createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Update campaign metrics

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [metricId: metrics.metricId, messagesSent: newMessagesSent, responsesReceived: newResponses, leadsGenerated: newLeads, lastUpdated: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Get campaign performance metrics with calculated rates
Create platform configuration

service-call.name: create#growerp.marketing.PlatformConfiguration
service-call.in-map: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, platform: platform, isEnabled: isEnabled, dailyLimit: dailyLimit, apiKey: apiKey, apiSecret: apiSecret, username: username, password: password, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Update platform configuration

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.PlatformConfiguration
service-call.in-map: [configId: configId, isEnabled: isEnabled, dailyLimit: dailyLimit, apiKey: apiKey, apiSecret: apiSecret, username: username, password: password, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Delete platform configuration

service-call.name: delete#growerp.marketing.PlatformConfiguration
service-call.in-map: [configId: configId]

service.description: List platform configurations for owner

iterate.script: configs.add([ configId: conf.configId, ownerPartyId: conf.ownerPartyId, platform: conf.platform, isEnabled: conf.isEnabled == 'Y', dailyLimit: conf.dailyLimit, apiKey: conf.apiKey, apiSecret: conf.apiSecret, username: conf.username, password: conf.password, createdDate: conf.createdDate ? ec.l10n.format(conf.createdDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, lastModifiedDate: conf.lastModifiedDate ? ec.l10n.format(conf.lastModifiedDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null ])

service.description: Send an outreach email for a campaign

service-call.name: growerp.100.NurtureServices100.get#TenantBaseUrl
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: companyPartyId]

service-call.name: growerp.100.OutreachServices100.update#CampaignMetrics
service-call.in-map: [marketingCampaignId: marketingCampaignId, incrementMessagesSent: true]

service.description: Start campaign automation - sets status to In Progress
Pause campaign automation - sets isActive to N
Get campaign automation progress and statistics
List outreach messages for owner with optional filters

iterate.script: messages.add([ messageId: msg.messageId, marketingCampaignId: msg.marketingCampaignId, platform: msg.platform, recipientName: msg.recipientName, recipientHandle: msg.recipientHandle, recipientProfileUrl: msg.recipientProfileUrl, recipientEmail: msg.recipientEmail, recipientCompany: msg.recipientCompany, recipientTitle: msg.recipientTitle, messageContent: msg.messageContent, status: msg.status, sentDate: msg.sentDate ? ec.l10n.format(msg.sentDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, errorMessage: msg.errorMessage ])

service.description: Generate a platform-optimized message from a campaign template using AI

actions.script: def result = GeminiAiUtil.generatePlatformMessage(ec, campaignTemplate, platform, actionType) platformMessage = result

service.description: AI-polish an already-personalised outreach message draft's tone (does not persist).

actions.script: polishedMessage = GeminiAiUtil.polishMessage(ec, draftMessage, platform, recipientName, recipientCompany, recipientTitle)
